ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was opened */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trade */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the trade */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the trade */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the trade */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was closed */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Quote asset volume of the trade */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the period */,
  "taker_base_asset_volume" REAL /* Taker base asset volume of the trade */,
  "taker_quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Taker quote asset volume of the trade */,
  "ignore_column" INTEGER /* Column used for internal purposes (often set to 0) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* The trading symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop loss) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the order that generated this trade */,
  "fee_asset" TEXT /* The asset used to pay the trading fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* The amount of the trading fee */,
  "maker_taker" TEXT /* Whether the trade was a maker or taker */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* The source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "last_trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last trade */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* The total number of trades executed by the user */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* The total volume traded by the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* A unique API key for the user */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Whether the user has two-factor authentication enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "user_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "base_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of the base asset traded */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop loss) */,
  "fee_asset" TEXT /* The asset used to pay the trading fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* The amount of the trading fee */,
  "maker_taker" TEXT /* Whether the trade was a maker or taker */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* The source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the market data */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the market data */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the market data */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the market data */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Quote asset volume of the market data */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* The number of trades that occurred during the period */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price for the period */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* The open interest for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geolocation of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the trade (e.g., exchange, wallet) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the order that generated this trade */,
  "trade_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the trade (e.g., stop loss, take profit) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* The source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_metadata_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
